title: cephalomanes boryanum
intro:
Cephalomanes boryanum, also known as the Bory's lip fern or Bory's spleenwort, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia.

This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cephalomanes boryanum include its potential to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant involve drying and processing its leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
